titleStmt.title: SII 16.57: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 57. (A.R. No. 474 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the rock in the Aruḷāḷa-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1438, Dhātri, Pushya ba. 7, Wednesday, corresponding to 1517 A.D., January 14.

States that the king, having conquered Udayagiri, captured Ravutarāya-mahāpātra, and having taken the hill fortresses of Addaṅki, Vinikoṇḍa, Bellaṁkoṇḍa, Taṅgēḍa, Kētavaram, etc., captured alive Virabhadrarāya, son of Pratāparudra-Gajapatirāya, Naraharidēva, son of Kumāra Haṁvira and others, performed tulāpurusha at Amarēśvara in Dharaṇikōṭa, returned to Vijayanagara and started out again on a campaign of conquest towards Kaliṅga, reached Bējavāḍa, conquered Koṇḍapalli, captured Praharāju Śiraśchandra-mahāpātra, Bōḍajana-Mahāpātra, Bijilikhānu and others, took at a stretch all the fortresses of Telaṅgāṇya such as Anantagiri, Uṇḍrakoṇḍa, Urlugoṇḍa, Aruvapalli, Jallipalli, Kandikoṇḍa, Kappaluvāyi, Nallagoṇḍḷa, Kaṁbhaṁmeṭṭu, Kanakagiri, Śaṁkkaragiri, etc., installed the Jayastaṁbha at Siṁhādri-Poṭnūru and performed the mahādāna there, returned to Rājamahēndra and desiring to have the mahādānas performed by his queens Chinnādēvi and Tirumaladēvi, returned to Vijayanagara and having visited, on the above date, with his queens, god Varadarāju at Vishṇu Kāñchi, and paid one thousand varāhas as kāṇike, had the puṇyakōṭi-vimāna of the god gilded with gold and granted the villages Vershāru, Tiruppālukaḍalu, Gōvindachēri, Nūṟappandāṅgal and Peḷūru yielding altogether annually 1,500 varāhas, to meet the expenses for the fortnightly puḻukkāppu service and daily offerings to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍḍa Arirāya vibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkkara bhāṣagetappuvarāyaragaṁḍḍa pū¨rvadakṣiṇapaści masamudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācārya gajapativibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīra kṛṣṇadēva mahārāyalu vijayanagarāsanuṁḍḍi pū¨rvadigvijayayātrakuviccēśi Udaya giridu¨rgamaṁnu sādhiṁcci ravutarāyamahāpātruniṁ baṭṭukoni . Addaṁkki . vinikoṁḍḍa . bellaṁkoṁḍḍa . nāgā¨rjanikoṁḍḍa . taṁgēḍa . kētavaraṁ . mōdalayina giridu¨rggasdhaladu¨rggālu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni koṁḍḍavīṭidu¨rggaṁmīda viḍiśi laggalu paṭṭiṁcci Ā du¨rggaṁ puccukoni . patāparudragajapatirāyala komāruṁḍu vīrabhadra rāyaṁḍu . komārahaṁvīrapātruni koḍuku naraharidēvu . rācūri mallūkhānuṁḍu . Uddaṁḍḍakhānuṁḍu . janyāla kasava pātruṁḍu pūsapāṭi rācirāju . śrīnātharāju lakṣmipatirāju . paścima bālacaṁdra mahāpātraṁḍu . vīru mōdalayina pātrasāmaṁtulānu maṁnevāri niṁni jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci dharaṇikōṭa Amarēśvarānanu tulāpuruṣa mahādāna muṁnu śāya navadhariṁcci tirigi vijayanagarānakuviccēśi sāmrājyaṁ cēsuṁnu mariṁni kaḷiṁggadēśa digvijayā¨rddhamai bejavāḍaku viccēśi koṁḍḍapallidu¨rggamuṁnu sādhiṁcci Ā du¨rggaṁmīṁdanuṁna . vraharāju śiraścaṁdra mahāpātruṁḍu . bōḍajana mahāpātruṁḍu . bijilikhānuṁḍu .
vīru mōdalayinavārini jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci . Anaṁtagiri . Uṁḍrakoṁḍḍa . U¨rllugoṁḍḍa . Aruvapalli . jallipalli . kaṁddikoṁḍa . kappaluvāyi . nallagoṁḍla . kaṁbhaṁmeṭṭu . kanakagiri . śaṁkkaragiri . yivi mōdalayina teluṁgāṁṇyapu du¨rggālu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni siṁhādri poṭnūriki viccēśi Akkaḍanu jayastaṁbhaṁ vēśi mahādānamuṁnu śāyanavadhariṁcci tirigi rājamahēṁdrāvarānaku viccēśi tama dēvuślu ciṁnādēvaṁma tirumaladēvaṁmaṁgāri cātanu mahādānālu cēyiṁ cca navadhariṁcci vijayanagarānaku viccēśi . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṭi dhāta saṁvatsara puṣya bahuḷa 7 budhavāraṁ nāṁḍu viṣṇukaṁcciki viccēśi varadarāja dēvuni da¨rśiṁcci dēvuniki kānike ga 1000 varahālu sama¨rpiṁcci dēvuni puṁṇyakōṭivimānānaku paiṁḍipūyiṁcci dēvuniki sama¨rpiṁcina grāmālu . ve¨rṣāru . tiruppālukeḍalu . gōviṁddacēri . nūṟappaṁdāṁgalu . kūḍi yī nālugu grāmāluṁnu ga 1100 varahālu paḷūru grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 400 varahā lu Ubhayaṁ grāmālu 5 ki ga 1500 varahālu yiṁduku dēvuniki padihēnudinālaku vokamāṭu puḷukāpu chātē Aṁduku ga 40 varahālu lke Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 960 varahālu . Avasarānaku dinaṁ 1 ki paḷyālu 30 ni dīpālu 50 ṭi lekhānu Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 540 varahālu kūḍi ga 1500 varahāla grāmāluṁnu sama¨rpiṁci yī śāva Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu naḍavavalenani yiccina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . yī Avasaraṁ viṭṭavan viḷukkāḍuku kaligina yeḍuṁnarapaḷyamunnu Appapaḍiṁni śaṭhagōpajiyyaṁgāri maṭhānaku śiṣyaparaṁparagānu vaiṣṇavula prasāpāṭuku pāliṁ stimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
